name: ghq-sector
description: CLI for organizing ghq-managed repositories into a symlinked workspace with code-workspace generation and a local config editor.

scripts.build-ui: bun install --cwd ui && bun run --cwd ui build
scripts.sync-ui-dist: mkdir -p dist/ui-dist && rm -rf dist/ui-dist/assets && cp -R ui/dist/* dist/ui-dist/
scripts.build: bun run build-ui && bun run sync-ui-dist && bun run build-bin
